reviewer_question_cluster: Why is shard 008 publishable now if Table 1E still has only one document-grade procedural anchor and a Springer-concentrated direct-notice top tier?
bounded_answer_now: Because the current publishable contribution is evidence architecture rather than contamination prevalence. The package already makes seven source-depth states reviewer-legible across two procedural rows and five research-integrity rows, with explicit branch labels, forbidden-overread rules, and threshold gates.
paper_thesis_use: Reviewer rebuttal, methods/results paragraph, thesis claim-boundary note, and venue-fit explanation for Table 1E.
dashboard_hook: Table 1E publishability legend; source-depth ladder; reviewer-warning sidecar.
uncertainty_or_claim_ceiling: Do not recast publishability as completeness, incident balance, sanction inventory, or system-wide legal-process evidence.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Keep the current evidence-architecture framing until one Finnish official companion or one non-Springer direct notice changes the top-depth ceiling.

reviewer_question_cluster: Is the Finland row being overread as official confirmation of AI-assisted administrative appeals?
bounded_answer_now: No. The safest reading remains one direct-source-resolved Yle row with institution-specific descriptive support plus an explicit official-probe ladder recording actor-role verification, governance context, bounded no-hit searches, and judicial search-surface friction. That package improves interpretability without becoming official phenomenon confirmation.
paper_thesis_use: Comparator-defense paragraph, multilingual limitations note, and thesis methods sidebar on rare-language authority asymmetry.
dashboard_hook: Authority-escalation ladder; jurisdiction/language caution overlay; legal-uncertainty companion note.
uncertainty_or_claim_ceiling: Do not convert actor-role verification, governance-context pages, or official search friction into official event confirmation, sanction proof, or broader legal conclusions.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Capture one Finnish police, court, ministry, or judicial-process document confirming the phenomenon or procedural response.

reviewer_question_cluster: Why keep the SAGE and NEJM rows visible if direct publisher pages are blocked from this lane?
bounded_answer_now: Because blocked-but-verified routes are methods-relevant evidence classes. The package can already distinguish verified article identity plus named-editor quotation (SAGE) and verified retraction DOI-pair metadata (NEJM) from direct publisher notice text, which is exactly the source-resolution lesson Table 1E is meant to preserve.
paper_thesis_use: Methods/results note on blocked-source friction, reviewer FAQ, and thesis appendix on evidence-depth heterogeneity.
dashboard_hook: Blocked-notice backlog panel; notice-depth funnel; source-friction facet.
uncertainty_or_claim_ceiling: Do not infer editorial reasoning, direct notice text, or final journal action from DOI metadata or mediated quotation alone.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Upgrade one blocked row only if a materially different public publisher-originating route or equivalent public record is actually captured.

reviewer_question_cluster: Does the Springer book notice solve shard 008's research-integrity top-depth problem?
bounded_answer_now: No. It solves venue-type singleton drift by adding a book-surface direct notice beside the Springer journal notice, but both top-depth rows still sit inside the Springer family. The gain is journal-versus-book breadth, not cross-publisher closure.
paper_thesis_use: Caption-safe explanation for manuscript, dashboard note, reviewer response, and thesis prose on top-depth heterogeneity.
dashboard_hook: Venue-type comparison card; notice-text funnel; publisher-concentration warning badge.
uncertainty_or_claim_ceiling: Do not present the two direct Springer notices as cross-publisher recurrence, generalized editorial-practice evidence, or resolved research-integrity breadth.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Prefer one non-Springer or otherwise publisher-diverse direct notice before any stronger comparative rhetoric.

reviewer_question_cluster: Why keep the residual bucket visible once one archived SSRN action record and two direct Springer notices exist?
bounded_answer_now: Because the mixed residual floor is itself publishable negative evidence. One residual row has escaped into an archived platform-action record, but two others remain specialist-report-only or unresolved discovery surfaces; hiding the bucket would falsely suggest the tail has already hardened into case-grade action records.
paper_thesis_use: Limitations paragraph, residual-quarantine explanation, and thesis note on why bounded weak floors remain scientifically useful.
dashboard_hook: Residual-category panel; blocked-source queue; source-family saturation sidecar.
uncertainty_or_claim_ceiling: Do not infer plagiarism findings, actor identity, sanction closure, or full-network resolution from the archived SSRN page alone.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Capture one second residual direct action record or one stronger non-Springer direct notice before softening residual-floor caution.

reviewer_question_cluster: What is the next real shard-008 gain that matters more than another packaging pass?
bounded_answer_now: A threshold-changing authority gain. The best dual-payoff move remains one Finnish official companion because it would strengthen both procedural-family depth and rare-language support; the next best research-integrity move is one non-Springer direct notice, while SAGE/NEJM blocked-route breakthroughs remain high-value but route-constrained from this host.
paper_thesis_use: Route-priority memo, reviewer-response closing paragraph, and thesis publication-roadmap note.
dashboard_hook: Priority ladder widget; next-upgrade card; blocker-order badge.
uncertainty_or_claim_ceiling: Do not treat packaging-only synchronization or repeated Springer rechecks as threshold-changing progress.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Prefer one real authority-changing Finnish companion or one publisher-diversifying direct notice over another derivative shard-008 helper layer.
